# bool / filter

The **bool** type's `data-view.filter` capability.

Contributes `DataViewSlots.Filter({ match: "bool", ... })` — the `is` / `is-not`
operator set whose value editor is a single explicit checkbox (so the rule reads
"<field> Is ☑"), plus the pure `predicate` applied in the data-view row pipeline.
A ticked box matches `true`, an unticked box matches `false` (the default).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Boolean field type: data-view filter operator set (is checked/unchecked).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `DataViewSlots.Filter` "bool"
  - Uses:
    - `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`
    - `primitives/data-view.DataViewSlots`
